name: Gate A — North Entry
description: Main north entry for sections 101–120. Accessible ramp on left. Security checkpoint, bag check. Opens 3 hours before kickoff.

name: Gate B — East Entry
description: East entry for sections 121–140. Nearest to Blue Lot parking. Fast-track lane for accessible guests.

name: Gate C — South Entry
description: Primary fan entry. Metro shuttle drop-off zone directly outside. Family zone inside (sections 201–210).

name: Gate D — West Entry
description: West entry for premium and VIP sections 301–320. Lower crowd density. Press entry also here.

name: Medical Station — North
description: First aid station near Gate A. Staffed by 4 paramedics. AED available. Open match day + 2 hours.

name: Medical Station — South
description: Main medical center near Gate C. Ambulance access. Language support for English and Spanish.

name: Prayer & Reflection Room
description: Quiet prayer room on Level 2 near Gate D. All faiths welcome. Prayer times posted at entrance. Wudu facility available.

name: Family Lounge
description: Family and baby care lounge near Section 205. Nursing area, stroller parking, child wristband station.

name: Accessible Restrooms — North
description: Fully accessible restrooms with grab bars and space for mobility aids. Level 1, near Gate A ramp.

name: Accessible Restrooms — East
description: Accessible restrooms on Level 1 and Level 2 east concourse, near sections 125 and 235.

name: Gate A → Section 110
description: From Gate A: straight ahead 60m on main concourse → right at food court → escalator to Level 2 → left 30m → Section 110 on right.

name: Gate C → Section 205 (Family Zone)
description: From Gate C: past security checkpoint → follow Family Zone blue signs → elevator available on left → Level 2 → Section 205.

name: Metro Line 2 — AT&T Stadium Station
description: Direct metro link. Trains every 8 min on match days. Platform at South Gate plaza. Sustainable option — 60% lower carbon than driving.

name: Fan Shuttle — Blue Route
description: Shuttle from Blue Lot (3km east). Departs every 15 min from 2h before kickoff. Accessible buses on this route.

name: Red Lot Parking — Gate B
description: Closest general parking. Opens 4h before kickoff. Accessible spaces in Row A (marked in blue). $40 on match day.

name: SoFi Stadium — Gate 1 (North Peristyle)
description: Main entry for Upper Bowl 500–600 level. Spectacular open-air entry. Metro C Line station adjacent.

name: SoFi Stadium — Gate 2 (East Club)
description: Club-level entry. Premium lounge access. Concierge at entry. Accessible drop-off bay.

name: MetLife Stadium — Gate A
description: North entry. NJ Transit train platform 5-min walk. Accessible ramp and elevator to all levels.

name: NJ Transit — MetLife Station
description: Direct train from Penn Station (NY). ~25 min. Special match-day trains every 10 min. Most eco-friendly option from NYC.
